# Drop

> Drop is a social website and iOS app for discovering live music — concerts, EDM shows, festivals, and club nights — with one-tap official ticket links. Releasing soon on iOS.

Drop is built by Resonance Ventures LLC. Primary site: https://trydropapp.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://trydropapp.com/): what Drop does, launch access signup
- [Events](https://trydropapp.com/events): browse live concerts, raves, festivals, and club nights by city, date, genre
- [Venues](https://trydropapp.com/venues): browse concert venues, clubs, and festival grounds by city
- [Artists](https://trydropapp.com/artists): browse artists with upcoming shows by city
- [For Promoters](https://trydropapp.com/promoters): list an event free on Drop
- [About](https://trydropapp.com/about): who builds Drop, why it exists
- [Get the app / waitlist](https://trydropapp.com/download): join the iOS launch waitlist
- [Privacy Policy](https://trydropapp.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://trydropapp.com/terms)
- [Get the app / links](https://trydropapp.com/link): app links, launch list, social — link-in-bio hub

## Contact

- Instagram: [@trydropapp](https://instagram.com/trydropapp)
- TikTok: [@trydropapp](https://tiktok.com/@trydropapp)
